steps.title: Identify the grammatical structure on both sides of the blank
steps.content: The sentence structure is 'uses chemistry and fossil evidence ______ oceans as they were in the past.' The blank follows the noun 'evidence' and requires a verb form that shows purpose.

steps.title: Apply the correct grammatical rule
steps.content:
The correct form is an infinitive 'to study' to indicate purpose.

This follows the structure 'use X to do Y.' The other choices violate this rule: 'studied' and 'studies' use incorrect verb tenses, and 'has studied' uses a perfect tense not aligned with the base form 'uses.' That is the correct answer.
